label: Beta 2.0.2
notes: Beta 2.0.2 — fixes beta-key activation: a regression was rejecting valid beta keys as ‘invalid’; that’s resolved, plus the clean-Mac TLS/certificate fix so activation works on a fresh Mac. Includes everything in 2.0: Connector V2 (Premiere↔Resolve), faster sync, on-device visual search, and reliability fixes. Available for Apple Silicon and Intel.
